name: Special Tool Properties
pages: This page shows all available $(thing)Special Tool Properties$() and their affections.

pages.title: Merciless
pages.text: Only included in $(l:smithing/tier_2_materials#frost_metal_tools)Frost Metal tools$(/l) by default. $(br)The item included this property will loss all enchantments' affection except $(thing)Durability/$、$(thing)Mending/$、$(thing)Riptide/$、$(thing)Royalty/$. But every level of these enchantments will provide 1 attack damage and 1 mining efficiency.

pages.title: Fire Reforging
pages.text: Only included in $(l:smithing/tier_2_materials#ember_metal_tools)Ember Metal tools$(/l) and $(l:smithing/tier_2_materials#multiphase_matter_tools)Multiphase Matter tools$(/l) by default. $(br)The item included this property will mend 2 damages every tick in the fire. Soul fire will be 5, and lava (cauldron) will be 10.

pages.title: Multiphase
pages.text: Only included in $(l:smithing/tier_2_materials#multiphase_matter_tools)Multiphase Matter tools$(/l) by default. $(br)The item included this property will have two "phases". Every phase will store their own name and enchantments, no affection with each other, and can switch by pressing [$(k:anvilcraft.switch_phase)] (your "Switch Phase" keybinding.)
